hooks.prompt:
You are maintaining ARCHITECTURE.md for the Fillit Design Lab project at /Users/samo/DesignLab/fillit-design-lab.

First, check if anything worth documenting changed this session by running: git -C /Users/samo/DesignLab/fillit-design-lab diff HEAD~1 HEAD --name-only 2>/dev/null

If no files changed (empty output or error), output {"continue": true} and stop — no update needed.

If files did change, update /Users/samo/DesignLab/fillit-design-lab/ARCHITECTURE.md to reflect the current state of the codebase. Read the existing ARCHITECTURE.md first (if it exists), then read whichever of these files are relevant to what changed:
- config/platforms.ts (platform/userType config)
- composables/ (all composables)
- components/app-sidebar.vue, components/right-panel.vue
- components/ui/input/FloatingLabelInput.vue, components/ui/select/FloatingLabelSelect.vue
- pages/preview/ (list the directory)
- server/api/ and server/data/ (list directories)

Keep the document concise and factual. Use this structure:

# Fillit Design Lab — Architecture

## Stack
List: Nuxt 3 version, Vue 3, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v3, shadcn-vue (New York style), Tabler icons, Reka UI

## Project structure
Key directories and their purpose (brief, one line each)

## Platform configuration (config/platforms.ts)
Explain the platform × userType matrix (fillit/eleaseloop × landlord/tenant) and which nav/org items each enables

## Pages
Table: Route | Page file | Description | Active sidebar item
Only pages/preview/* routes

## Shared components
List key non-shadcn components: app-sidebar.vue, right-panel.vue, FloatingLabelInput, FloatingLabelSelect — one-line description + props/slots for each

## Composables
List each composable: name, what it manages, key exports

## Data layer
server/api routes (GET/PUT for teams, centres, spaces) and corresponding server/data/*.json files. Note that data files are the source of truth and are mutated by PUT routes.

## UI patterns
Brief notes on recurring conventions: floating label inputs, FloatingLabelSelect trigger-prefix slot, Button variants, table header style, team selector pattern, date range picker

_Last updated: [today's date]_

Write the file, then output {"continue": true}.
